title: lysimachia maritima var. obtusifolia
intro: Lysimachia maritima var. obtusifolia, also known as Sea Wort or Shore Forget-me-not, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the primrose family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and wounds. The health benefits of Lysimachia maritima var. obtusifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues, skin problems, and respiratory infections.
